metadata.name: drone-startup
metadata.title: 🤖 Welcome, Automation Drone - Configure Your Operations

story.introduction: ⚙️ Systems online, Automation Drone! You excel at repetitive tasks and systematic operations. Let's configure your automation preferences.
story.context: Drone users have access to automation tools, scripting capabilities, and systematic workflow management.
story.purpose: Set up automation preferences and workflow configurations

variables.name: AUTOMATION-FOCUS
variables.prompt: What do you want to automate first?
variables.help: We'll set up templates and scripts for your chosen automation area

variables.name: SCHEDULE-PREFERENCE
variables.help: This configures the default timing for your automation scripts

variables.name: NOTIFICATION-LEVEL
variables.prompt: How much feedback do you want from automated processes?
variables.help: Controls how much information your automation systems provide
